Off Calendar May-06-2009 Continued To Jun-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear and show cause why he/she should not be held in contempt for failure to respond to the Examinier's notes dated March 23, 2009 and for failure to appear. The return date is June 17, 2009 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Ann Mendoza, CSR#6812. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Jackson.
